en: It's supposed to be at night.
Shit, that looks good, that looks really good.
ko: 와, 진짜 맛있어 보여, 정말 맛있어.

en: No Disneyland, no live new girls.
This is what drives life in college. Are you having sex or aren't you?
ko: 이게 대학 생활의 원동력이야. 섹스할 건지 말 건지.

en: It's why people take certain classes and sit where they sit and do what they do when at some center, you know, that's what they do.
ko: 사람들이 특정 수업을 듣고, 앉는 자리와 행동하는 이유야, 알지?
